purpose: Production background catalog for Ayah Studio.
requirements: Source name and URL must be documented.
License must allow the intended publishing use.
No external watermark or required visible attribution inside the final video.
The file must be visually reviewed so it does not obscure Quran text or important landmarks.

backgrounds.name: Makkah inspired production background
backgrounds.license: Original project-generated asset. Approved for Ayah Studio publishing use. No external attribution required.
backgrounds.reviewNote: Generated locally with FFmpeg as an abstract Makkah-inspired background; avoids third-party imagery.
